title: combine optimize
description: fps boost lightweight and focus on performance modpack
body:
Combine Optimize - Ultimate Lightweight Performance Modpack

Welcome to Combine Optimize! A Minecraft modpack designed to supercharge your gameplay experience by combining the best performance-enhancing mods from some of the most popular optimization-focused packs.

Overview

•Combine Optimize takes the best performance mods from Fabulously Optimized, Remarkably Optimized, SOP, and Adrenaline and combines them into one super-efficient, fast, and visually smooth Minecraft experience.

•Performance Focused: Mods like Sodium, Lithium, C2ME, and Dynamic FPS ensure your game runs   faster and smoother, even on lower-end hardware.

•Visual Enhancements: Built-in shader support, zoom, and connected textures keep the game looking fantastic without sacrificing performance.

•Vanilla-Compatible: The pack stays true to the vanilla gameplay experience, offering optimization without any game-changing mechanics.

•Customization Ready: This modpack is built to be flexible—add your own mods or tweak existing ones to further enhance your experience!

•Don’t forget: Want to explore even more mods? Feel free to try out additional mods and make this pack truly your own!

Features

•Optimized Gameplay: Maximize your FPS and reduce lag with top-tier optimization mods.

•Shader & Texture Support: Experience visual improvements while maintaining high performance.

•Pure Vanilla Experience: No changes to core gameplay mechanics—just faster, smoother performance.

•Lightweight: Designed to run smoothly even on lower-end systems.

•Easy to Extend: Add other mods to the pack for a truly personalized Minecraft experience.


Mod Suggestions

•While Combine Optimize is optimized for performance out-of-the-box, feel free to add your own mods to enhance your experience:

•World-Generation Mods: Mods like Biomes O' Plenty, TerraForged, or Traverse can bring new terrain to your world.

•Quality-of-Life Mods: Mods like Just Enough Items (JEI), WorldEdit can improve your gameplay.

•Game Enhancements: If you like custom gameplay features, try mods like Tinkers' Construct, Create, or Botania.

Version History

•v0.0.1 - Initial release. Optimized for performance with core mods like Sodium, Lithium, C2ME, and Dynamic FPS. Includes shader and texture support, keeping Minecraft vanilla-friendly (1.21.4).
•v0.0.2 - the next release. just like v0.0.1 but newer version (1.21.11) and a bit slower performance than 1.21.4 (v0.0.1) because its the new version.

Credits

•Sodium, Lithium, C2ME, Dynamic FPS....

•Special thanks to the contributors and open-source community for their invaluable input into improving Minecraft’s performance and stability.

Enjoy your optimized Minecraft experience and happy crafting!

Notes:

1. Customization: The pack is lightweight and designed to be fully customizable. Feel free to add or remove mods according to your preferences.

2. Updating: Future updates will include bug fixes, performance tweaks, and possibly additional mods. Keep an eye out for updates to ensure optimal performance!
